title: With You, Ma
description: Aadya refuses to do anything without her Ma - whether it’s packing a bag for their holiday to Assam or it’s playing in the river. Will this trip make Aadya more self-reliant?

pages.text:
“With you, Ma!” says Aadya.
Ma wants Aadya to pack her bag. They are going
to an island called Majuli in Assam.
“Why don’t you try packing by yourself?” says Ma. But Aadya keeps sitting by her side.

“With you, Ma!”
It’s a big ferry - so many people. But everyone is smiling.
There’s water, all around.
Ma is buying tickets. Aadya runs fast to stand with her. Majuli is very far! We took a plane, a car, and now a ferry ride!

“With you, Ma” says Aadya.
She wants to go on the same scooter as Ma. They are going to be staying in a school for two days.

The next day, Ma and Aadya visit the school.
“Hi! I’m Kim-kim and this is my sister…”
“Aallooo,” says Muang-muang. “Do you want to play? Come.”

Within a few minutes Aadya and Kim-kim become best friends.
“Ma, see me.”
They jump from log to log.
They ride a wooden horse.
They play in the sand.
They run around the firewood gaadi.
Adhumpa! Adhumpa!
Tu-duk!
Tu-duk!
Tok-tok!
Tok-tok!
Ssssrrrrr-tik-tik! Sssssrrrrr-tik-tik!
Duuurrrr- drrrrrrr!

“Ma, see me.”
Gudu-gudu-gudu-gudu.
They run to the hand-pump
Chapppp-chapppp-chapppp-chappp. They splash in the water.
“Aadya, it’s time for food!” says Ma.
“Feed me, Ma!”
Nom-nom-nom-nom. They eat
rice and daal. BUUURRRRRRPPPPP!

Tip-tip tip-tip tip-tip tip-tip. Droplets fall from the sky.
“Aadya! Come! We are going to the river,” says Kim-kim.

Gudu-gudu-gudu-gudu
Wrrrrr-wrrrrrrrrrrr
Dhop-dhum-dhup-dhom
Frrrrrrr-shhhttttt
Nomnomnomnom!
Dip-dip-dip-dip
Ma watches Aadya as she comes back with her new friends from the river.
They are laughing and eating bugories.

The next day, Ma and Aadya get ready to go home.
“Aadya, let me help you with your shoelaces,” says Ma.
